dispatch_rule: A row may enter in_progress only with one writer, an exact isolated worktree, disjoint ownership roots, a signature story, evidence paths, and executable leaf gates.
hold_rule: Unassigned worktrees, overlapping ownership, missing backend contracts, empty Buck2 target sets, stale reference digests, or missing jurisdiction and independent-review receipts fail closed.

capabilities.label: Responsive left-main-right console shell

signature_story.outcome: An authenticated operator preserves route, selected work, and communication context while moving between persistent, compact, and mutually exclusive drawer layouts using keyboard or touch.

capabilities.label: Overview action queue, agenda, and keyboard workflow

signature_story.outcome: An authenticated operator scans the real action queue and agenda, moves through authorized work with J/K or arrows, opens the selected item with Enter, and retains usable layout at narrow widths.

capabilities.label: Benefits catalog and lifecycle

signature_story.outcome: An authorized benefits administrator creates and updates a catalog item and its children, transitions lifecycle, observes audit evidence, and a MEMBER receives a non-leaking denial.

capabilities.label: Compliance obligation, regulation, framework, control, and evidence catalog

signature_story.outcome: A qualified compliance owner traces a regulation to obligations, controls, and accepted evidence, transitions governed lifecycle with audit, while unauthorized and cross-tenant reads reveal neither rows nor counts.

capabilities.label: Shared governed ontology, action, workflow, history, and audit substrate

signature_story.outcome: An authorized user defines or consumes a typed object, traverses governed links, preflights and executes an action, and reads lifecycle, history, lineage, and audit consistently in every consuming module.

capabilities.label: Production subcontracting signature workflow

signature_story.outcome: Customer demand becomes a capacity- and material-checked staffed plan, executed operations and quality evidence, finished delivery, settlement, and margin.

capabilities.label: Logistics subcontracting signature workflow

signature_story.outcome: An inbound notice proceeds through receiving, putaway, replenishment, pick and pack, dispatch, delivery evidence, SLA evaluation, and cost settlement.

capabilities.label: Integrated facility management signature workflow

signature_story.outcome: A service obligation or request is triaged, safely scheduled and assigned, executed with evidence, accepted by the customer, and reflected in SLA, energy, and cost reporting.

capabilities.label: Equipment rental, repair, refurbishment, and resale signature workflow

signature_story.outcome: Availability and suitability lead to quote and approval, dispatch and handover, inspection and maintenance, return assessment, then repair, refurbishment, resale, or redeployment.

capabilities.label: Consulting engagement and realized-benefit signature workflow

signature_story.outcome: A diagnostic produces evidence-backed findings and initiatives, approval and implementation, measured benefit, and a sustain-or-correct decision.

capabilities.label: Owned-plant production configuration

signature_story.outcome: Miryang, Changwon, and Ulsan configure plant-specific routing, quality, equipment, workforce, and cost without forking the shared production ontology or application.

capabilities.label: Payroll run pipeline: close, calculate, exceptions, approval, disbursement, payslip receipt

signature_story.outcome: A pay period closes attendance-complete, calculates, surfaces exceptions for resolution, routes for approval, schedules disbursement, and delivers payslips with acknowledged receipt.

capabilities.label: Attendance plan-vs-actual, exceptions, substitute coverage, 52h monitor, gated close

signature_story.outcome: A day's plan versus actual reconciles: check-ins, exceptions with mandatory reasons, substitute coverage, weekly-52h monitoring, and a gated monthly close.

capabilities.label: Recruiting: posting publish preflight, applicant pipeline, offer, hire creates employee object

signature_story.outcome: A job posting publishes through preflight, applicants advance through evaluation to offer, and acceptance creates the employee object with full audit lineage.

capabilities.label: Organization chart: entities, sites, teams, positions, governed org-change lifecycle

signature_story.outcome: An organization change drafts a new entity, site, or team structure, passes impact preflight and SoD approval, takes effect on its effective date, and reflects across scope segments and the graph.

capabilities.label: Performance review cycles: goals, self/manager evaluation, calibration, person-ledger finalization

signature_story.outcome: A review cycle opens with goals, gathers self and manager evaluations with evidence links, calibrates, and finalizes into the person ledger with audit.

capabilities.label: Movement-derived stock, cycle counts, variance reconciliation

signature_story.outcome: Stock levels derive from movement documents; a cycle count reconciles variances through approval into adjusted stock with audit lineage.

capabilities.label: Dispatch queue, crew/vehicle assignment, tracking to completion

signature_story.outcome: A dispatch request is scheduled to a crew and vehicle, tracked to completion, and its outcome feeds work-order and cost records.

capabilities.label: Maintenance request to scheduled work order, execution evidence, asset-history close

signature_story.outcome: A maintenance request becomes a scheduled work order, executes with evidence, and closes into asset history and cost.

capabilities.label: Customer-site intake to field visit, check-in, work log, acceptance

signature_story.outcome: A customer site intake becomes a field visit with check-in, work log, and customer acceptance reflected in SLA and billing.

capabilities.label: Records registration, classification/retention, WORM evidence chain, verified retrieval

signature_story.outcome: A record registers with classification and retention, seals into the WORM evidence chain, and is retrievable with verified integrity.

capabilities.label: Notification full view: aggregate by object/channel, resolve to source, ack/mute/route

signature_story.outcome: Notifications aggregate by object and channel, resolve to their source objects, and are acknowledged, muted, or routed per user policy.

capabilities.label: Scoped notice publishing with acknowledgment tracking

signature_story.outcome: A notice publishes to scoped audiences with acknowledgment tracking to completion.

capabilities.label: People/team directory: live org placement, contact channels, object links, PBAC-scoped search

signature_story.outcome: Every person and team resolves to a card with live org placement, contact channels, and object links, searchable and PBAC-scoped.
